title: Standing Stone
flavor: A lichen-crusted dolmen hums with old power. The Sídhe do not give freely.

options.label: Offer HP (20)
options.desc: Sacrifice 20 HP for a random boon.

title: Sacred Well
flavor: A holy well bubbles up between the stones, its waters blessed by the old gods.

options.label: Fill your flask
options.desc: Heal 25 HP and gain +2% Max HP regen per tick.

title: The Fallen Fian
flavor: A warrior of the Fianna lies here, spear still in hand, felled far from Tara.

options.label: Take their boon
options.desc: Absorb the power of a fallen hero.

title: The Púca's Bargain
flavor: A shape shifts in the shadows — the Púca offers a bargain, as it always does, at a price.

options.label: Refuse the voice
options.desc: Nothing happens. Some deals aren't worth making.
options.resultMsg: You refuse the Púca's offer. It shrieks and dissolves into mist.

title: The Ogham Stone
flavor: Ancient ogham notches catch the light, whispering half-forgotten lore.

title: Fomorian Plunder
flavor: A raiders' stash, abandoned in haste. The Fomorians left in a hurry.

options.label: Grab quickly
options.desc: 50/50: gain 2000 gold OR trigger a trap (−30 HP).

title: Font of Danu
flavor: Runes of the Tuatha Dé Danann glow faintly, charged with Otherworld power.

options.label: Purify
options.desc: Cure all status effects and gain poison immunity.

title: Fomorian Armory
flavor: Barbed iron weapons of the sea-raiders, still stained dark.

options.label: Take the cursed blade
options.desc: +8 ATK — but suffer 3 turns of poison.

options.label: Walk away
options.desc: Some power is not worth the price.
options.resultMsg: You leave the Fomorian iron untouched.

title: Echo of the Fili
flavor: A fractured echo of a poet-seer lingers, reciting fragments of forgotten verse.

title: The Bradán Feasa
flavor: A salmon glimmers beneath black water, said to hold all the world's wisdom in its flesh — whoever tastes it first will know all things.

options.label: Let it swim on
options.resultMsg: You let the salmon swim on, wisdom deferred to another day.

title: The Ríastrad's Echo
flavor: The echo of the Hound of Ulster's battle-frenzy lingers here — the warp-spasm that turned Cú Chulainn monstrous in war, one eye swallowed and the other bulging forth.

options.label: Master your fury
options.resultMsg: You steady your breath. The warp-spasm passes you by, this time.

title: The Keening
flavor: A banshee's cry rides the wind — an omen of a death not yet decided. To hear it and live is a kind of luck.

options.label: Heed the warning
options.desc: Cure all status effects and gain poison immunity.

options.label: Laugh in its face
options.desc: +6 ATK — but the omen's chill lingers (3 turns poison).

title: The Well of Segais
flavor: Nine hazel trees ring this well, forever dropping their nuts of wisdom into the water below — the source of every river in Ériu.

options.label: Drink from the well
options.desc: Heal 30 HP and gain +2% Max HP regen per tick.

title: The Selkie's Pelt
flavor: A sealskin lies discarded on cold stone, warm as though shed only moments ago. To wear it is to become something Other.

options.label: Wear the pelt
options.desc: Absorb the power of the Otherworld.

options.label: Leave it be
options.resultMsg: Some transformations aren't meant for you. You leave the pelt for its owner.

title: Manannán's Mist
flavor: A silver fog rolls in off an unseen sea — Manannán mac Lir's mist, which hides the Otherworld's roads from mortal eyes.

options.label: Walk blind into the mist
options.desc: 50/50: gain 2200 gold OR stumble into a trap (−28 HP).

options.label: Wait for it to clear
options.resultMsg: The mist thins and rolls back out to sea. Nothing ventured.
